channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Young Kenol Manager Dies Suddenly Before Wedding
item.description: Kevin Masaba, 28, an Assistant HR Manager at Kenol, died suddenly on July 3, 2026, just two months before his wedding. Friends and family are in shock as they await postmortem results to determine the...

item.title: NECTA Cancels 58 Students' Exam Results Over ChatGPT Use
item.description: The National Examinations Council of Tanzania (NECTA) has canceled the results of 58 students who used ChatGPT during exams, emphasizing that technological tools cannot be used to gain unfair advantag...

item.title: Iran's missile attacks on Hormuz raise concerns over Qatari tanker safety and regional tensions
item.description: The article details Iran's recent missile strikes in the Strait of Hormuz, which have placed a Qatari oil tanker at significant risk of explosion. The incident has heightened tensions between Iran and...

item.title: Impeachment Trial of VP Sara Duterte: Early Stages and Legal Proceedings
item.description: The impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte is in its early stages, with both the defense and prosecution teams emphasizing that it's too premature to assess wins or losses. Attorney Michael ...

item.title: Rajasthan woman plots mother's murder for government job and stages accident
item.description: A 23-year-old woman in Rajasthan, Ayushi, is accused of murdering her mother, Neeraj Sharma, to inherit family property and secure a government job on compassionate grounds. Police allege she conspire...

item.title: NATO Leaders Attend Reception in Ankara Hosted by Erdoğan
item.description: The 36th NATO Summit, hosted by Turkey's President Recep Tayyip Erdoğan at the presidential complex in Ankara, continued its program with an elaborate reception. Erdoğan and his wife Emine welcomed al...

item.title: Pakistan launches four-year Hajj policy and savings scheme for pilgrims
item.description: The Pakistani federal cabinet, chaired by Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif, approved a groundbreaking four-year Hajj Policy and Plan (2027-2030) aimed at modernizing pilgrimage management. The policy int...

item.title: Renaissance Africa Energy discovers significant light oil reserves off Nigeria's coast
item.description: Renaissance Africa Energy Company Limited has made a major discovery of light oil off Nigeria's coast, marking the first significant find for the indigenous operator since taking over one of the count...

item.title: A Children's Guide to the Chicken Life Cycle
item.description: The article highlights a children's book that explores the life cycle of a chicken, from egg to adult. Featuring artwork by Stephanie Fizer Coleman, the book uses simple text and vivid images to expla...

item.title: Evacuation Ordered as Construction Site Faces Potential Collapse
item.description: On July 7, 2026, PIX 11 anchor Dan Mannarino and co-anchor Vanessa Freeman abruptly cut their broadcast short as the building directly across from their newsroom, 235 East 42nd Street, faced a critica...

item.title: Youth Music Awards Relocate to Liverpool to Support Grassroots Music Initiatives
item.description: The Youth Music Awards, the UK's largest grassroots music awards, have announced their relocation to Liverpool for the 2026 edition. This decision follows a six-year tenure in London and aims to addre...

item.title: Kerala landslide: Two deaths, seven missing as construction debris traps workers
item.description: A severe landslide struck a road tunnel project site in Kelladi, Wayanad district of Kerala on Tuesday, resulting in at least two fatalities and leaving seven people missing. Heavy rainfall triggered ...

item.title: Cuba faces third major power outage of the year as grid restoration efforts continue
item.description: Cuba is grappling with its third nationwide power outage of 2026, with authorities still working to restore electricity to millions across the island. The blackout, which occurred on Monday, left the ...

item.title: Mother Says Final Goodbye to 2-Month-Old Daughter Before Flight in Emotional TikTok Video
item.description: JoJo Mami Inaya, a Kenyan mother, shared an emotional farewell to her two-month-old daughter at the airport in a viral TikTok video. The clip shows her holding her baby for the final time before board...

item.title: Pregnant Driver Survives Near-Miss After Metal Pole Falls From Truck On SoCal Freeway
item.description: A metal pole that fell from a truck on the 5 Freeway in Temecula, California, pierced the windshield of a van and struck a pregnant woman in the abdomen, according to the California Highway Patrol (CH...

item.title: French Prosecutors Launch Investigation Into Racist Remarks by Paraguayan Senator Toward Mbappé
item.description: French prosecutors have initiated an investigation into aggravated public insult and incitement to hatred after a Paraguayan senator racially targeted Kylian Mbappé following France’s World Cup victor...

item.title: NATO Spending Gaps: Key Contributors and the Need for Increased Commitment

item.title: Tanzania VP urges trade fair to advance Vision 2050 agenda
